review_title: The tool i was looking for
description: Finally I can save time gathering data for report. Now me and the clients have a live dashboard with all marketing data, that we can look at in meetings.
author: Maia H.
pros: - Gathers all data in one dashboard - saves time and make it easier to get overview - Great support/service - Really like that webleads is also included. Normally you would pay quite a bit for a software that only shows webleads.
cons: Some occasional bugs maybe. But overall experience is great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Futuristic Marketing Software to Excel in the Industry
description: Brillant, service is immense. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] is a top guy. Wish them the very best with this software
author: Jason H.
pros: Its ability to show results all under one platform. This gives us marketers a quick indication of how campaigns are performing. The software works for both the agency & the client/company you're working for. The ability to give the client login and let them have full or limited access to there marketing campaigns. I found from working in this sector for many years, this was always grey area between agency and client. But Agency360 has completely fixed that. We are always looking at innovative ways of generating results for businesses and their web leads function is a clever tool for B2B businesses.
cons: There is nothing. As times changed and new marketing channels are implmented, this tool will be updated accordingly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall very satisfied. We a missing some features but should be on the way.
author: Mathias C.
pros: B2B leads system that uses IP tracking.
cons: We are missing features suchs as e-mail marketing, snapchat and split screen integration. Should be one the way.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Finally, this is the right app for us.
author: Anna P.
pros: Easy to use and great for our business and its needs. Modern and clean design makes it easy to understand all the functions of the application and achieve your results. Informativeness is in the first place, all reports and data collection are much more convenient to see the big picture in one place.
cons: I think that we are quite satisfied with everything to talk about some shortcomings.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very good. Most features are working flawlessly but it has some minor bugs. These are fixed witnin hours.
author: Anders L.
pros: Very good price Easy to use Fantastic info about users Great support
cons: Some bugs, but usually fixed quickly. Don't have much negative to say!

review_title: Granular reporting and great site audit
description: I'm fully satisfied with the quality and a feature list provided.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great and fully customizable all-in-one platform. It's very convenient to have all the important website data in one place, including clients' responses, social media and web analytics, backlinks, keywors and more.
cons: I can complain only about the price, which is quite high.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Agency360 has quickly become a stable in our B2B clients marketing strategy – providing both a clean overview of accumulated web-data and easy access to leads that sales-departments can use in their daily (now warmer) cold-calling. We use webleads mainly for sales, but also to qualify that the leads our ads create are relevant and in the right businesses-sectors for our clients. In a world where channels like Facebook are gaining ground even in B2B advertising this has proven invaluable. I cannot recommend this tool enough.
author: Nicolai B.
pros: We mainly use the software for it's webleads feature & reporting capabilities.
cons: The link-building feature still leave some to be desired.

author: Vevien C.
pros: Agency 360 is very easy to use, and it works both for our company and the client we are working for. Our clients can now see the Analytics and SEO issues of their website easily because of Agency360. And it helps us to be more organized in our SEO and Marketing works. Agency360 also upgraded our subscription to 25 users for free!
cons: It will take 1 to 2 days before the fixes we have done for the SEO issues to reflect on the SEO audit. And sometimes, we are experiencing some bugs but it was usually fixed quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fast to setup and gives a great overview
description: Great dialogue with the team, that really listens to the inputs of improvement I come with
author: Kasper H.
pros: It's very easy to setup new reports and "dashboards" with a few clicks and connect to external channels
cons: Missing a few on the design part of he reporting
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
